Cuguoğlu curator writer, based Francisco Area Istanbul.
co-founder non-profit initiative "Collective Çukurcuma" artistic research project "IdentityLab" TR); former projects manager Zilberman Gallery (Istanbul Berlin).
writings have been published various online published magazines, including Asia Pacific, Hyperallergic, South Africa, Istanbul News.
Recently, took part Orleans Curatorial Intensive funded SAHA, TATE Intensive (London) funded Roberto Cimetta fund.
received Psychology Social Psychology focusing cultural studies, currently enrolled Graduate Program Curatorial Practice California College Arts.
Selected exhibitions curated Cuguoglu are: Anger solution, anger means kittens (D21 Kunstraum Leipzig, 2018), Ghosts (Red Bull Around Arnavutköy, Istanbul, 2018), Restless Monuments (Zilberman Gallery, Istanbul, 2018), House Wisdom (Various spaces Nottingham, 2018; Public Program 15th Istanbul Biennial; Framer Framed, Amsterdam; Dzialdov, Berlin; 2017), Survival (Cultural Transit Foundation, Yekaterinburg; Space Debris, Istanbul; 2017), Asymmetric (COOP Gallery, Nashville; Mixer, Istanbul; 2016), After Alexandria, Flood (5533 Recai Mehmed Efendi Library, Istanbul, 2015).

most remarkable interpreters generation, Claire Désert entered Conservatoire National Supérieur Musique Paris when just years old.
After studies with Ventsislav Yankoff Jean Hubeau, received premiers prix piano chamber music.
After admission postgraduate cycle, granted French government scholarship study year with Evgeniy Malinin Tchaikovsky Conservatory Moscow.
Upon return, completed second postgraduate year chamber music with Roland Pidoux.
addition numerous solo appearances international music festivals such Radio France Montpellier, Roque d'Anthéron, Piano Jacobins, Piano Lille Festival, 'Folles Journées' Nantes, Bilbao, Lisbon Tokyo, Claire Désert also often appears with Orchestre Paris, Orchestre national d'Île-de-France, Orchestre philharmonique Radio France, Orchestre symphonique Québec, Orchestre philharmonique Strasbourg, Orchestre National Lille, Budapest Symphony Orchestra.
keen chamber musician, regularly partners such eminent artists Emmanuel Strosser, Anne Gastinel, Philippe Graffin Gérard Caussé, well Quatuor Sine Nomine Quintette Moraguès.
impressive discography includes Scriabin Dvorak concertos with Orchestre philharmonique Strasbourg (which received French 'Victoire Musique' 1997), Brahms programme pianos with Emmanuel Strosser three programmes with cellist Anne Gastinel.
Recent releases include Schumann's Davidbündlertänze, Dvořák's Slavonic Dances piano duet with pianist Emmanuel Strosser, Abendmusik, solo album dedicated Clara Robert Schumann Brahms.
latest recording, Schumann's Fantasie
Romances
Waldszenen, awarded Choc-Classica, Joker Crescendo Magazine Supersonic Pizzicato.

DIEGO WASHINGTON, D.C. Sept. 2018 West Health, family nonpartisan, nonprofit organizations focused healthcare research, policy philanthropy, appointed Cristina Boccuti, MPP, formerly Kaiser Family Foundation, director health policy Gary Mary West Health Policy Center(WHPC), bolstering commitment lowering healthcare costs America enabling successful aging nation's seniors.
While $3.3 trillion 17.9 percent Gross Domestic Product spent healthcare U.S. 2016, recent survey from West Health Institute NORC University Chicago showed that three-quarters Americans think good value healthcare spending percent skipped recommended medical care because costs.
With 10,000 baby boomers turning every healthcare costs consuming unaffordable portion household expenses many seniors, West Health focused addressing cost care older adults Americans.
Boccuti associate director Kaiser Family Foundation's program Medicare policy where analyzed Medicare reform proposals.
Prior joining Kaiser Family Foundation, Boccuti principal policy analyst with Medicare Payment Advisory Commission (MedPAC) director policy coordination Bureau Health Professions Health Resources Services Administration, agency Department Health Human Services focused improving access care underserved populations.
also held positions Urban Institute Government Accountability Office.
West Health's policy efforts healthcare costs focused lowering prescription drug pricing allowing Medicare negotiate directly with pharmaceutical manufacturers, improving transparency healthcare pricing accelerating adoption value-based payment models.
2018, West Health hosted Healthcare Costs Innovation Summit, focused advancing solutions America's healthcare cost crisis planning hosting 2019 Healthcare Costs Innovation Summit Washington D.C. April 2019.

Daniel Harris, Masthope, Lackawaxen formerly Matamoras, Pompton Lake, died Friday, February 2019 Geisinger Wyoming Valley Wilkes Barre.

addition parents predeceased brother-in-law, David Heerse.
